heading: Omitted
label: 473 to 484d Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 473 to 484d, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 473, , , established the Alaska militia.act Dec. 31, 1941, ch. 644, § 155 Stat. 879Section 474, , , exempted from militia service all persons exempted by laws of the United States, judges of several courts of Territory, and members and officers of Alaska Territorial Legislature.act Dec. 31, 1941, ch. 644, § 255 Stat. 879Section 475, , , established Alaska National Guard.act Dec. 31, 1941, ch. 644, § 355 Stat. 879Section 476, , , gave Governor of Territory of Alaska as ex officio commander of militia, like command of Alaska National Guard while not in Federal service.act Dec. 31, 1941, ch. 644, § 455 Stat. 879Section 477, , , provided for appointment of Adjutant General of Territory of Alaska.act Dec. 31, 1941, ch. 644, § 555 Stat. 880Section 478, , , provided for ratification and confirmation of existing military forces.act Dec. 31, 1941, ch. 644, § 655 Stat. 880Section 479, , , gave Governor power to organize a Territorial Guard during time that Alaska National Guard might be under Federal service.act Dec. 31, 1941, ch. 644, § 755 Stat. 880Section 480, acts , title I, § 101, ; , title I, § 107(3), (7), (9), , 638, authorized government of Alaska to create a public corporate authority to undertake slum clearance and urban redevelopment projects.July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 344Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 78369 Stat. 637Section 480a, acts , title I, § 102, ; , title I, § 107(3), , authorized government of Alaska to assist slum clearance and urban redevelopment through cash donations, loans, conveyances of real and personal property, facilities and services.July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 344Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 78369 Stat. 637Section 480b, , , ratified all legislation enacted prior thereto by Legislature of Territory of Alaska.act July 18, 1950, ch. 466, title I, § 10364 Stat. 345Section 481, acts , ; , title II, § 201(a), , authorized Legislature to create public corporate authorities to undertake slum clearance and projects to provide dwelling accommodations for families of low income and for persons (and their families) engaged in national-defense activities.July 21, 1941, ch. 311, § 155 Stat. 601July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 345Section 482, acts , ; , title II, § 201(a), , authorized Legislature of Territory of Alaska to provide for appointment of Commissioners.July 21, 1941, ch. 311, § 255 Stat. 602July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 345Section 483, acts , ; , title II, § 201(a), , authorized Legislature of Territory of Alaska to issue bonds or other obligations with such security and in such manner as the legislature may provide.July 21, 1941, ch. 311, § 355 Stat. 602July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 345Section 483a, , as added , title II, § 201(a), , ratified all prior acts enacted by Legislature of Territory of Alaska.act July 21, 1941, ch. 311, § 4July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 345Section 483b, , as added , title II, § 201(a), , granted additional powers to Legislature of Territory of Alaska.act July 21, 1941, ch. 311, § 5July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 345Section 484, acts , ; , , authorized Legislature of Territory of Alaska to establish Alaska Housing Authority.Apr. 23, 1949, ch. 89, § 363 Stat. 58July 14, 1952, ch. 723, § 766 Stat. 603Section 484a, , , authorized Housing and Home Finance Agency to provide technical advice and information and to cooperate with and assist the Alaska Housing Authority.act Apr. 23, 1949, ch. 89, § 463 Stat. 59Section 484b, , , provided for retention of permanent housing by the Housing and Home Finance Administrator.act Apr. 23, 1949, ch. 89, § 563 Stat. 69Section 484c, , , authorized transfer of real or personal property of other Government departments or agencies to Alaska Housing Authority.act Apr. 23, 1949, ch. 89, § 663 Stat. 60Section 484d, , as added , , and amended, related to insurance of mortgages on property in Alaska. See , Banks and Banking.act June 27, 1934, ch. 847, title II, § 214Apr. 23, 1949, ch. 89, § 2(a)63 Stat. 57section 1715d of Title 12
